description: obsidian-operator pre-flight enforcement: when /daily-init is invoked, check the vault for any missing weekly review / AI weekly digest / monthly pulse / quarterly review / quarterly plan that should already exist (per daily-init Pre-Flight Steps 1, 1b, 1c, 1d, 1e), and inject a <system-reminder> additionalContext forcing the missing skill(s) to run first. Harness-level enforcement so the auto-trigger cannot be silently rationalize-skipped (regression observed 2026-05-01 + 2026-05-02 — April Monthly Pulse missed for 2 consecutive days because Claude flagged-and-skipped the auto-trigger inside daily-init).
